case_title: DANNY PATEL VS. GEORGE SCHAEFFER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SCHAEFFER, GEORGE
